headline: Welcome to AI-Prowler Home Version 6.0.0
body:
Your Personal Agentic AI Knowledge Base for Claude.

AI-Prowler Home Version for Windows 11 indexes your local documents and makes them searchable through Claude — on desktop, web acess, and mobile acess.

• Index local and onedrive documents from any folder on your PC with 65+ file formats supported
• Data Base supports rich Meta Data and meaning allowing Agentic AI to query intelligently.
• Index 65+ file formats supported including Images or Scanned PDF with Optical Character recognition to extract text.
• Connect via Claude Desktop (local) or Claude.ai (Remote)
• Smart scan skips binaries and system files automatically, Automatic Scheduled scan updates available
• AI-Prowler Home is free to use on the desktop (remote access requires Claude Pro and Cloudflare accounts)

Get started: click the Index Docs tab to add your first folder.
footer: AI-Prowler Home — Free for personal use  |  Business & Mobile Business editions available
